t_ch: ——之前我教你把「齿轮与智慧」拆散以后再藏起来，记得吧？你最后把它拆成了多少个部件来着？
t_en: That Gears and Wisdom sculpture I told you to take apart and hide away... Can you remind me how many pieces it had?

t_ch: 唔…好像是不到<unbreak>60</unbreak>个。
t_en: Uhh... a little less than <unbreak>60</unbreak>.

t_ch: …这才像话嘛！就知道你小子刚才又在跟我开玩笑，把我吓出一身冷汗。
t_en: Now that's more like it! You had me in a cold sweat with those jokes...

t_ch: 进来吧，赶紧进屋来，咱们好好讨论下接下来的生意怎么进行。
t_en: Here, hurry up and come inside. We need to discuss the details of our next operation.

t_ch: 你听到一阵清脆的「咔哒」声。寒腿叔叔打开了房门。
t_en: You hear a "click." Mr. Cold Feet opens the door.

t_ch: 轻轻地推门而入。
t_en: Gently push open the door and enter.

t_ch: 呃…大概<unbreak>40</unbreak>多个？
t_en: Uhh... about <unbreak>40</unbreak>?

t_ch: 很明显，你回答错了。寒腿叔叔这下不做声了…糟糕。
t_en: You obviously answered wrong. Not a peep can be heard from Mr. Cold Feet. Uh-oh....

t_ch: 你，解决了星核危机的英雄，大守护者敬重的战友宾朋…要是只因为眼前小小的一道宾馆房门就让犯人溜走了，岂不令人耻笑？
t_en: Wouldn't it be a shame if you, the hero of the Stellaron crisis, the supreme guardian's respected comrade-in-arms, let the prisoner slip away... just because of a hotel door?

t_ch: 留在你眼前的选择有，且只有一个……
t_en: There is only one choice left in front of you...

t_ch: 猛地一下破门而入！
t_en: Break down the door with a bang!

t_ch: 噢…好像拆成了<unbreak>20</unbreak>个。
t_en: Uhh... around <unbreak>20</unbreak>.

t_ch: 很明显，你回答错了。寒腿叔叔这下不做声了…糟糕。

t_ch: 猛地一下破门而入！
t_en: Break down the door with a bang!

t_ch: <unbreak>500000</unbreak>信用点！
t_en: <unbreak>500,000</unbreak> credits!

t_ch: 什么，五十万？！就凭你小子这点口才，能谈成这种价码？！
t_en: What? <unbreak>500,000</unbreak>!? No offense kid, but I can't see you haggling that kinda number...

t_ch: 还是说，你…唔…这什么破宾馆啊，房门上怎么连个猫眼都没有？
t_en: Or maybe you... Ugh, what kind of hotel is this, anyway? No peepholes on the doors?

t_ch: （他开始怀疑我了…这可不妙。）
t_en: (He's starting to suspect me... that's not good.)

t_ch: （下个问题无论如何都得考虑清楚再做回答。）
t_en: (I better think through the next question carefully before answering.)

t_ch: 小子，有件事我突然记不清了，你提醒我一下——
t_en: Y'know, I just realized there's something I forgot — maybe you could help me remember.

t_ch: ——之前我教你把「齿轮与智慧」拆散以后再藏起来，记得吧？你最后把它拆成了多少个部件来着？

t_ch: 猛地一下破门而入！
t_en: Break down the door with a bang!

t_ch: 哎哟…哎哟喂！这不是{NICKNAME}大客户吗！
t_en: Oh... I mean — oh! If it isn't my valued client, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 居、居然又见面了嘿，瞧瞧咱俩这缘分！咱这友谊的大桥都快一路修上永冬岭了！
t_en: Wh—What a pleasant surprise to see you again. Isn't it amazing how fate brings people together? Our bridge of friendship could extend all the way to Everwinter Hill!

t_ch: 我早就猜到是你了！
t_en: I guessed it was you from the beginning!

t_ch: …但也只是猜的而已，也拿不出什么证据，是吧？
t_en: "...Guessed?" So, you don't have any evidence...

t_ch: 不怪你，谁叫老桑博最近表现得那么安分呢？我就差每天去铁卫禁区给放哨的卫兵送早饭了，嘿嘿。
t_en: ...Eh-he. Well, I mean... how could you! Your old buddy Sampo is a model citizen, these days. Y'know the guards on sentry duty in the restricted zone? I deliver their breakfast every day, hehe...

t_ch: 居然没人怀疑到你身上…
t_en: It's amazing no one suspected you...

t_ch: 没办法，谁叫老桑博最近表现得那么安分呢？我就差每天去铁卫禁区给放哨的卫兵送早饭了，嘿嘿。
t_en: ...Eh-he. Well, I mean... how could you! Your old buddy Sampo is a model citizen, these days. Y'know the guards on sentry duty in the restricted zone? I deliver their breakfast every day, hehe...

t_ch: 那个，{NICKNAME}，你倒是多说两句啊，不然这场面多尴尬！
t_en: Ahem... So, kinda cold out, huh, {NICKNAME}? Man, this is getting uncomfortable...

t_ch: 这样，我倒是有个提议，你看看合不合适——你瞧，我这段时间搞文物生意赚了几个小钱…我把我所得的三分之一给你，怎么样？
t_en: Okay, okay, I have a proposal — I'm sure you'll find this very reasonable. Yeah, I made a few small fortunes in the artifact business lately... and I can give you a third of my earnings. How about that, huh?

t_ch: 作为交换，还请你高抬贵手，别跟铁卫说起我的事…就说你扑了个空，反正他们也不会为难你这大英雄的，对吧？
t_en: In exchange, I only ask that you please don't tell the Silvermane Guards about me... Just tell them you missed the culprit. You're a big hero — they won't give you a hard time about it, right?

t_ch: 怎么样？三分之一可是一笔大钱，你仔细考虑考虑！我可从来不敢坑你啊，大客户！
t_en: How's that sound? One-third is a lot of money — think about it! I would never dare to rip off a valued client such as yourself!

t_ch: （拒绝）你别想收买我！
t_en: (Reject) You think I can be bought?

t_ch: 这，你这…怎么油盐不进啊，这可不像你啊，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: I... I mean... H—How can you be so unaccommodating? That is not like you, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 行吧…没想到我桑博英明一世，这次居然栽在自己的老客户手上了…你该通知谁就赶紧通知吧，办事麻利点，我也能少吃点苦头……
t_en: *sigh* I knew the good times couldn't last, but I didn't think a valued client would bring them to a close... Go ahead, notify the authorities — I'd rather burn out than fade away.

t_ch: （接受）行吧，就这么办。
t_en: (Accept) Okay, it's a deal.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，我就知道你是个识时务的角色！
t_en: Hehe, I knew you were a reasonable person.

t_ch: 给，拿着！「寒腿叔叔」向来说话算话，很高兴能跟你做成这次生意！
t_en: Here, here, take it! Mr. Cold Feet always keeps his word. It's been a pleasure doing business with you!

t_ch: 那…老桑博就先走一步了，祝你跟你的朋友都能度过开心的今天、明天、还有后天！
t_en: Well, I'll be on my way then. I wish you and your friends a happy today, a happy tomorrow, and a happy day after that!

t_ch: （桑博应该已经走远了…给佩拉发个消息吧。）
t_en: (Sampo's probably miles away already... I should send a message to Pela.)

t_ch: 桑博从房间里消失了。脚步声、开窗声、开门声——你一概没有听见。
t_en: Sampo has vanished. No sound of hurried footsteps, no sound of a window or door opening...

t_ch: （可恶，居然就这么让他跑了……）
t_en: (Ugh, I let him get away...)

t_ch: （没办法…只能先等佩拉过来了。）
t_en: (Too late now... I'll have to wait for Pela to get here.)

t_ch: 在空荡荡的客房里等了一会儿……
t_en: You wait for a while in the empty room...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我来了！嫌疑犯在哪？！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I'm here! Where is the suspect?

t_ch: 他从我眼皮子底下跑了。
t_en: He escaped from under my nose.

t_ch: 他…「噗」地一下就消失了。
t_en: He... vanished into thin air.

t_ch: 这样啊…那家伙，还是一如既往地狡猾，而且还擅长一些莫名其妙的戏法……
t_en: I see... So he's just as cunning and crafty as ever...

t_ch: 也怪不得他这段时间能把铁卫忽悠得团团转，让大家都以为他已经改头换面了…不过也有好处，以后他再也别想拿那些小花招骗过我们了，绝对别想！
t_en: He fooled the Silvermane Guards into thinking he'd changed... but we won't be falling for that act again any time soon!

t_ch: 这次行动就到这里结束吧，{NICKNAME}。你已经帮了我们太多了，后面的追查交给铁卫巡逻队就好。
t_en: This operation ends here, {NICKNAME} — you've helped us enough already. Leave the rest to the Silvermane Guards.

t_ch: 来，这些是给你的奖励，请一定收下！希望能在你后面的旅行中派上用场。
t_en: Here, these rewards are for you. I hope they come in handy on the journey ahead.

t_ch: 哦，对啦，如果你还想继续帮忙经营历史文化博物馆的话，我和艾丽斯小姐随时欢迎你哦。
t_en: Oh, by the way, if you still want to help run the History and Culture Museum, Miss Eris and I are always happy to work with you.

t_ch: 啊，这么说来，艾丽斯小姐刚才还在找你呢——要不，你还是去博物馆找她聊聊吧？
t_en: Ah, speaking of which, Miss Eris was just looking for you — why don't you go to the museum and talk to her?

t_ch: 在空荡荡的客房里等了一会儿……
t_en: You wait for a while in the empty room...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，抱歉让你久等啦，我来了。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I'm here. Sorry to keep you waiting.

t_ch: 嗯…这房间倒是有些被人使用过的痕迹。应该不是你弄的吧？
t_en: Hmm... did you touch anything? This room has signs of activity.

t_ch: 我进来时房间里已经没人了。
t_en: There was no-one here when I arrived.

t_ch: 不，这些和我没关系。
t_en: Nope, nothing to do with me.

t_ch: 这样啊…看来那个「寒腿叔叔」，真是狡猾得很……
t_en: I see... Mr. Cold Feet is a cunning one indeed...

t_ch: 身份藏得这么深，而且还有相当可靠迅速的消息源…我猜他应该已经知道诺尔伯特少爷被抓的事了，所以才能溜得这么快。
t_en: He knows how to keep his identity hidden, and his sources are fast and reliable... I guess he found out about Mr. Norbert's arrest and made a run for it.

t_ch: …不过贝洛伯格就这么大，除非他敢一个人躲到雪原里去，否则迟早都会被我们抓住的。
t_en: ...Still, Belobog is only so big. Unless he's brave enough to hide out in the Snow Plains, we'll catch him sooner or later.

t_ch: 这段时间真是辛苦你协助啦，{NICKNAME}。你已经帮了我们足够多了，后面的追查交给铁卫巡逻队就好。
t_en: Thank you for all your hard work, {NICKNAME} — you've helped us enough already. Leave the rest to the Silvermane Guards.

t_ch: 哦，对啦，如果你还想继续帮忙经营历史文化博物馆的话，我和艾丽斯小姐随时欢迎你哦。
t_en: Oh, by the way, if you still want to help run the History and Culture Museum, Miss Eris and I are always happy to work with you.

t_ch: 啊，这么说来，艾丽斯小姐刚才还在找你呢——要不，你还是去博物馆找她聊聊吧？
t_en: Ah, speaking of which, Miss Eris was just looking for you — why don't you go to the museum and talk to her?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您好！感谢您一直以来的协助，历史文化博物馆现在又重现生机了…我只在小的时候见过这么热闹的景象！
t_en: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, hello! Thank you for all your help — business at the museum is booming again! I haven't seen this many people here since I was a little girl!

t_ch: 啊，对了，我有件事想跟您说来着：之前有位蓝色头发的先生跑来这里，给我留下了一张便笺，请我转交给博物馆的经理。
t_en: Oh, right! There's something I wanted to tell you: A man with blue hair came along and left a message. He asked me to pass it on to the manager of the museum.

t_ch: 便笺在这里——上面的内容我还没看过，您要不要亲自过目一下？
t_en: Here — I haven't read the content. Do you want to take a look?

t_ch: 阅读便笺上的内容。
t_en: Read the message.

s_en: Note Left by the Blue-Haired Man
t_ch: 「致我最最最亲爱的大客户{NICKNAME}——恭喜你！铭记今天吧，因为今天你差点就抓住了伟大的寒腿叔叔！」
t_en: "To my dearest and most valued client, {NICKNAME} — congratulations! Remember this day as the day you almost caught the great Mr. Cold Feet!"

s_en: Note Left by the Blue-Haired Man
t_ch: 「话说回来，博物馆经营游戏玩的还开心吗？友情提醒你，叔叔在这方面可是一把好手！」
t_en: "So, how's museum manager life treating you? Just a little reminder — when it comes to working in museums, I'm quite the dab hand..."

s_en: Note Left by the Blue-Haired Man
t_ch: 「有需要的话随时打我号码，你的老朋友保证随叫随到！放心吧，干一行爱一行，我很有敬业精神的——绝对连展品的一根毫毛都不碰。嘿嘿。」
t_en: "What I mean to say is, If you're ever in need of a passionate and professional individual — one with an inside knowledge of museum security blind spots — I'm only a call away! Don't worry, my exhibit smuggling days are behind me, hehe..."

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您好！感谢您一直以来的协助，历史文化博物馆现在又重现生机了…我只在小的时候见过这么热闹的景象！
t_en: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, hello! Thank you for all your help — business at the museum is booming again! I haven't seen this many people here since I was a little girl!

t_ch: 啊，对了，我有件事想跟您说来着：之前有位蓝色头发的先生跑来这里，给我留下了一张便笺，请我转交给博物馆的经理。
t_en: Oh, right! There's something I want to tell you: A man with blue hair came along and left this message with me. He asked me to pass this on to the manager of the museum.

t_ch: 便笺在这里——上面的内容我还没看过，您要不要亲自过目一下？
t_en: Here — I haven't read the content. Do you want to take a look?

t_ch: 阅读便笺上的内容。
t_en: Read the content on the message.

s_en: Note Left by the Blue-Haired Man
t_ch: 「致我最最最亲爱的大客户{NICKNAME}——感谢你！多亏了你的宽宏大量，伟大的寒腿叔叔才能在贝洛伯格的雪原上自由地驰骋！」
t_en: "To my dearest and most valued client, {NICKNAME}, from the bottom of my heart — thank you! Your generosity means that Mr. Cold Feet is free to keep roaming the snowy plains of Belobog!"

s_en: Note Left by the Blue-Haired Man
t_ch: 「话说回来，博物馆经营游戏玩的还开心吗？友情提醒你，叔叔在这方面可是一把好手！」
t_en: "So, how's museum manager life treating you? Just a little reminder — when it comes to working in museums, I'm quite the dab hand..."

s_en: Note Left by the Blue-Haired Man
t_ch: 「有需要的话随时打我号码，你的老朋友保证随叫随到！放心吧，干一行爱一行，我很有敬业精神的——绝对连展品的一根毫毛都不碰。嘿嘿。」
t_en: "What I mean to say is, If you're ever in need of a passionate and professional individual — one with an inside knowledge of museum security blind spots — I'm only a call away! Don't worry, my exhibit smuggling days are behind me, hehe..."

t_ch: 你有兴趣来博物馆当志愿者吗？
t_en: Are you interested in volunteering at the museum?

t_ch: 是那座贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆么？没想到如今又要开张了呢。
t_en: You mean the Belobog History and Culture Museum? I didn't realize it was opening back up again.

t_ch: 想来，我小时候还时常缠着养父母，问他们何时才能进到博物馆参观…没想到如今真的迎来这样的一天了。
t_en: Come to think of it, when I was young I used to pester my foster parents about going there all the time... I never thought such a day would come.

t_ch: 那么，我该如何成为博物馆的志愿者呢？我很乐意帮忙，但肯定免不了要提交申请材料一类的东西吧。
t_en: So then, how do I become a volunteer? I'd love to help out, but surely there's an application form of some sort to fill out?

t_ch: 你可以填写这张申请表。
t_en: Yes. Here is your application form.

t_ch: 「志愿导览员申请表」…呵呵，还真是有模有样。
t_en: "Application Form for Volunteer Guides"... Hehe, it does look very official.

t_ch: 虽然…但是…不用照看诊所吗？
t_en: Yeah... But shouldn't you be watching the clinic?

t_ch: 呵呵，没问题。上层区的仁爱医院在我这里派驻了许多助手，暂时把诊所交给他们就能放心了。
t_en: Hehe, it's fine. Charice Hospital sent us a lot of staff from the Overworld to help out, so the clinic's in good hands.

t_ch: 总之，是要填这个「志愿导览员申请表」…对吗？呵呵，还真是有模有样。
t_en: Anyway, I need to fill out this "Application Form for Volunteer Guides"... right? Hehe, it does look really official.

t_ch: 那我先花些时间来填写，就请你稍作等候了。
t_en: I'll go ahead and fill this out then. Just give me one moment...

t_ch: 好了。接下来该把它交给谁呢？
t_en: All done. Where do I submit the application?

t_ch: 博物馆前台的艾丽斯小姐。
t_en: Give it to Miss Eris at the museum reception.

t_ch: 艾丽斯小姐…我记住了。稍后收拾停当了我就出发。
t_en: Miss Eris... Got it. Once I've settled everything, I'll be off.

t_ch: 不过，可以拜托你同我一起前往博物馆吗？如果有你照应，想必就不会遇到太多麻烦了。
t_en: But, could I please ask you to accompany me to the museum? With you looking after me, I don't think I'll run into any trouble.

t_ch: 我会替你转交的。
t_en: I'll turn in the form for you.

t_ch: 呵呵，多谢你的好意。
t_en: Hehe, I appreciate the gesture.

t_ch: 不过，正好我也想去博物馆看看…机会难得，就让我陪你一起去递交简历吧？
t_en: But it just so happens that I want to go to the museum anyway... It's a rare opportunity. So can I go with you?

t_ch: 当然没问题，我们走。
t_en: Of course. Let's go.

t_ch: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。那我们出发吧。
t_en: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Then let's go.

t_ch: 那我在博物馆前台等你。
t_en: I'll wait for you at the museum reception.

t_ch: 嗯，谢谢你。那我们就在博物馆会合吧。
t_en: Okay, thank you. Let's meet up at the museum.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，您好！我和佩拉小姐又筛选了一批博物馆志愿导览员推荐信，终于发现了合适的人选……
t_en: Hello, {NICKNAME}! Pela and I have been screening prospective volunteer guides for the museum recently, and we've finally found the right candidate...

t_ch: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是机械屋「永动」的主人<color=#dbc291ff>希露瓦</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Could help us contact the owner of the Neverwinter Workshop, <color=#dbc291ff>Serval</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是磐岩镇的行脚医生<color=#dbc291ff>娜塔莎</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Could you help us contact the itinerant doctor at the Boulder Town, <color=#dbc291ff>Natasha</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是磐岩镇的鼹鼠党首领<color=#dbc291ff>虎克</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Could you help us contact the chief of Boulder Town's Moles, <color=#dbc291ff>Hook</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是银鬃铁卫戍卫官<color=#dbc291ff>杰帕德</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Could you help us contact the captain of the Silvermane Guards, <color=#dbc291ff>Gepard</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 这次想要请您帮忙联系的是「地火」的干部<color=#dbc291ff>希儿</color>——拜托您了，{NICKNAME}！
t_en: Could you help us contact the cadre of the Wildfire, <color=#dbc291ff>Seele</color> — thanks, {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，您好！这次拜托您来，其实是想和您传达一件事……
t_en: {NICKNAME}, hello there! I've summoned you here to tell you about something...

t_ch: 您也知道我们博物馆重启不久——虽然从贝洛伯格各地搜集来的展品已经基本能够满足展览需要，但我们的导览工作仍有大量职缺。
t_en: You know that our museum has only reopened just recently — and so while our exhibits from all over Belobog meet our standards, we're still severely short of tour guides.

t_ch: 为此，佩拉小姐决定向贝洛伯格全体公众发出职位邀请。如果有人能够向我们推荐合适的人选，还可以获得豪华奖励！
t_en: That's why Miss Pela has been sending out invitations to the entire populace of Belobog. There's also a splendid reward for anyone who can recommend the right candidate to us!

t_ch: 近期，我和佩拉小姐又筛选了一批博物馆志愿导览员推荐信，终于发现了合适的人选……
t_en: Pela and I have been screening prospective volunteer guides for the museum recently, and we've finally found the right candidate...

t_ch: 没想到室内是这样…真是座气派的博物馆呢。
t_en: I didn't expect things to look like this inside... What a magnificent museum.

t_ch: 然后…艾丽斯小姐，对吗？我听说志愿导览员申请表需要交到你这里……
t_en: Now then... Miss Eris, right? I heard that volunteer guide applications need to be submitted to you...

t_ch: 您好！请您稍等，我这就把您的简历转交给佩拉小姐！
t_en: Hello! I'll pass your resume on to Miss Pela right away!

t_ch: 如今克里珀堡办事效率意外地高呢…{NICKNAME}，就请你再陪我稍等一会儿吧？
t_en: Qlipoth Fort has been running surprisingly efficiently recently... {NICKNAME}, can you stay on with me a while longer?

t_ch: 原来是娜塔莎小姐！好久不见。
t_en: It's Miss Natasha! Long time no see.

t_ch: 是啊。好久不见了，佩拉小姐。
t_en: Indeed. Good to see you again, Miss Pela.

t_ch: 你们居然见过？
t_en: You two know each other?

t_ch: 是啊。上下层区交接的时候，我负责与「地火」的各位接洽——那时候我受了娜塔莎小姐许多照顾呢。
t_en: That's right. When the Overworld and Underworld were reconnected, I was in charge of contacting everyone in Wildfire. At that time, it was Miss Natasha who took care of me.

t_ch: 呵呵，不敢当。那么，接下来的流程是怎样的呢？
t_en: Hehe, you're too kind. So then, what's the next step in the application process?

t_ch: 我也和你好久没见了啊！
t_en: I haven't seen you in a long time either!

t_ch: 很久吗？真的？你要不要再考虑考虑？
t_en: Really? A long time? Does time flow differently for you?

t_ch: 呵呵，看来你们的关系不错。那么，接下来的流程是怎样的呢？
t_en: Hehe, looks like you two are quite familiar. So then, what's the next step?

t_ch: 嗯…接下来我们需要进行一个简单的面试。不过，别担心，我们只是走个流程，不会问太多问题的。
t_en: Hmm... Next up, we need to conduct a quick interview. But don't worry. It's just a formality, and we won't ask too many questions.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你需要作为辅助评定人参与面试——有什么事还没办的话先去吧，我们会等你的。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, since you're the assistant assessor of the interview, we'll begin when you're ready.

t_ch: 你来了，{NICKNAME}。我们可以开始了吗？
t_en: And now you're back, {NICKNAME}. Can we begin the interview now?

t_ch: 开始吧。
t_en: Let's begin.

t_ch: 好的。那我们就开始吧，娜塔莎小姐。
t_en: Alright. Let's get started then, Miss Natasha.

t_ch: 请再稍等我一会儿。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 没问题，我们会等你的。
t_en: No problem. We'll wait for you.

t_ch: 请问吧，佩拉小姐——只要能帮上忙，我一定知无不言。
t_en: Ask away — I'll answer everything to the best of my knowledge.

t_ch: 谢谢你。那么就从姓名这栏开始入手吧……
t_en: Thank you. Then let's begin with the name column...

t_ch: 虽然这个问题与志愿导览员资质无关，但出于好奇，我还是想要提问——
t_en: Now, this question actually has nothing to do with the requirements to become a volunteer guide, but I just want to ask out of curiosity —

t_ch: 我注意到娜塔莎小姐您似乎只写了名字，却没写姓氏…想请问一下，这其中是有什么考虑吗？
t_en: I noticed here that Miss Natasha has only written a given name here, but not any surname... May I ask what provoked that?

t_ch: 哎呀呀…不愧是铁卫的情报官，连这种细节都逃不过你的眼睛呢。
t_en: Oops... As expected of a Silvermane Intelligence Officer, you don't miss a thing.

t_ch: 是啊，为什么呢？
t_en: Indeed. So what happened to the surname?

t_ch: 呵呵，既然你也这么好奇，那我就解释一下吧。
t_en: Hehe, since you're so curious, I'll fill you in.

t_ch: 嗯…你还记得「风雪免疫」事件吗？那时我曾和你说过自己的身世。
t_en: Hmm... Do you remember that whole "Blizzard Immunity" thing? I told you about my personal experiences back then.

t_ch: 如果不记得了，那我再解释一下也无妨。
t_en: If you don't remember, it won't hurt to go over it again.

t_ch: 这个问题是否有点尖锐…
t_en: This question seems rather pointed...

t_ch: 呵呵，不会的。既然佩拉小姐好奇，那我就解释一下吧。
t_en: Hehe, nah. Since you're so curious, I'll fill you in.

t_ch: 其实，答案很简单：我从小没有见过自己的双亲，也不记得他们赋予我的姓氏……
t_en: Actually, the answer's very simple: Ever since I was a child, I've never met my parents, and I don't remember the surname they passed down to me...

t_ch: 虽然后来赫罗瓦夫妇收留了我，但他们也没有做这样的事——他们只希望我能够做我自己，而非某个家族的注脚，我也就不在乎这件事了。
t_en: The Harrowers had taken me in, but they didn't ask me to take their surname — they just hoped that I could be myself, and not just a footnote of some family line. I never cared too much about the matter.

t_ch: 赫罗瓦…难道是仁爱医院以前那位院长吗？
t_en: Harrower... Wasn't that the surname of the old director at Charice Hospital?

t_ch: 没想到佩拉小姐也知道他…他应该在你出生以前就退休了。
t_en: I didn't think you'd know him... He retired long before you were even born.

t_ch: 毕竟是贝洛伯格的知名人物啊——抱歉，我没想到娜塔莎小姐竟然有这样的身世……
t_en: Well, he's a famous figure in Belobog's history — sorry, I never expected Miss Natasha to have such a colorful background...

t_ch: 至少让我们听到了珍贵的故事。
t_en: Such a precious family story. Thanks for sharing.

t_ch: 问得很好，下次别问了。
t_en: Nice one, Pela. But don't you think that question is a bit nosy?

t_ch: 连你也…我知道错了啦！
t_en: Wh—what... Even you don't like that question... Alright, I get it, my bad!

t_ch: 没关系，无伤大雅，佩拉小姐不必放在心上。让我们继续吧？
t_en: That's okay. It's no big deal — don't worry about it, Miss Pela. Shall we continue?

t_ch: 谢谢娜塔莎小姐…我们继续吧。不过话说回来，您的履历非常漂亮，性格和能力也无可指摘…只要经过规范培训，您是一定能胜任这个职位的。
t_en: Thank you, Miss Natasha... Let's continue. But having said that, your resume is beautifully written. Both your character and ability are beyond reproach... Once you've gone through the standard training, you'll be a shoo-in for this position.

t_ch: 呵呵，佩拉小姐言重了。如果实在没什么可考查的，想听听我的过去也无妨——两位可以随意提问哦？
t_en: Hehe, you're flattering me. If you really have nothing else to inquire about, then it's okay if you want to hear about my past — you two are free to ask questions.

t_ch: 这…非常感谢您，娜塔莎小姐！不过我得想一想……
t_en: That's... Thank you very much, Miss Natasha! But I'll have to think about it...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你有什么想问的吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, have you got any questions to ask?

t_ch: 想了解一下赫罗瓦夫妇。
t_en: Tell me more about the Harrowers.

t_ch: 叶甫尼•赫罗瓦和凡妮莎•赫罗瓦，他们俩可能是贝洛伯格史上最知名的外科医生夫妇了…当然，也是我的养父母。
t_en: Yevgeny and Vanessa Harrower: They might just be the most renowned couple among Belobog's surgeons... Of course, they were also my foster parents.

t_ch: 你还记得吗，{NICKNAME}？「风雪免疫」那件事里，你和我一起见了凡妮莎——也就是我的养母一面。
t_en: Do you still remember, {NICKNAME}? Back during those Blizzard Immunity days, when you and I met Vanessa — my adoptive mother?

t_ch: 养父他是贝洛伯格首屈一指的外科专家，把自己的一生都奉献给了仁爱医院；而养母她更擅长理论研究，因此留在了医学院带领项目组进行学术攻坚。
t_en: My adoptive father was the leading surgeon in all of Belobog — he devoted his life to Charice Hospital. Mom was better at theoretical research. She stayed at the medical school leading the project team in their academic research.

t_ch: 赫罗瓦夫妇都是品行高尚的人…我深受触动，这才选择踏上了行医之路。
t_en: The Harrowers are great people... I was so impacted by them that I took up medicine myself.

t_ch: 想了解一下科学考察队。
t_en: Tell me more about the scientific expeditionary team.

t_ch: 在大守护者可可利亚上任以前，筑城者们始终没有放松对壁外的探索——科学考察队则承担了这个危险的任务。
t_en: Before Supreme Guardian Cocolia took office, the Architects had never suspended exploration beyond the outer walls. And the scientific expeditionary team was entrusted with this dangerous task.

t_ch: 这支考察队由一群充满好奇心的学者和探险家组成，他们志愿探明贝洛伯格以外的世界，并试图为人们找到另一处家园。
t_en: This expeditionary team consisted of a group of curious researchers and explorers who had volunteered to discover a world beyond Belobog, trying to find another home for our people.

t_ch: 而我为了取得执业资格，加入到他们的行列中，成为了考察队的随行队医。然而，正是在那一年，大探险家佩妮娅女士不幸牺牲了……
t_en: I joined their ranks in order to get my credentials and became the expeditionary team's accompanying doctor. However, that was the very year in which the great explorer Penya passed away...

t_ch: 没想到您还见过我的母亲……
t_en: I never expected you to have met my mom...

t_ch: …我很抱歉，佩拉小姐。那时我们已经想尽了一切办法，但实在是回天乏术……
t_en: ...I'm sorry, Miss Pela. We tried everything we could, but there really was nothing we could do...

t_ch: 我明白，娜塔莎小姐。过去的事就让它过去吧……
t_en: I understand, Miss Natasha. Let bygones be bygones...

t_ch: 想了解一下野战治疗医院。
t_en: Tell me more about field hospitals.

t_ch: 野战治疗医院啊…我想，佩拉小姐应该比我更了解这个话题吧？
t_en: Field hospitals... I guess Miss Pela knows more about those than I do?

t_ch: 嗯，那就由我来负责说明吧。野战治疗医院是隶属于银鬃铁卫后勤部的医疗机构，主要负责对战场伤员的随行医护工作，但也会定期面向全体公众开放。
t_en: Well, then allow me to explain. Field hospitals fall under the Silvermane Guards' Logistics Department, and are mainly responsible for providing on-the-spot medical care for those wounded in battle — but they're also often available for the masses, too.

t_ch: 我记得…在可可利亚大人上任以前，银鬃铁卫的战略还是以防守为主——那时的野战医院，绝大部分时间里应该都与普通医院无异吧？
t_en: I remember... Before Madam Cocolia took office, the Silvermane Guards were still focused on defense — back then, field treatment hospitals were pretty much just the same as normal hospitals, right?

t_ch: 呵呵，佩拉小姐猜得不错。那时我们很少接到随军出征的任务，平时都在门诊接待普通居民，和在仁爱医院实习没什么差别。
t_en: Hehe, you're right. Back then, we rarely received expeditionary orders and mostly treated normal citizens, which wasn't really any different from doing an internship at Charice Hospital.

t_ch: 但自从可可利亚上任之后，战况愈演愈烈，野战医院的压力也渐渐增大。但那时的我已经回到了下层区……
t_en: But after Madame Cocolia took office, the fighting intensified and field hospitals were under more stress. But by that time, I'd already returned to the Underworld...

t_ch: 有时候，仔细一想…也会觉得自己和逃兵没什么区别呢。
t_en: Sometimes, when I think things over carefully... I feel like I'm no different from a soldier deserting the army.

t_ch: 想了解一下铆钉镇的孤儿院。
t_en: Tell me more about Rivet Town's orphanage.

t_ch: 我回到下层区后，平日里除了四处问诊，剩下的时间便是照顾孤儿院里的孩子们——儿童公社，这是孤儿院的另一个名字。
t_en: After I got back to the Underworld, I'd spent all my time running around treating patients and looking after the children at the orphanage — the clinic nursery was really just another name for an orphanage.

t_ch: 但…后来发生了什么，想必你们也知道了——铆钉镇在裂界侵蚀下沦陷，我们迫不得已离开了那个地方，来到了现在的磐岩镇。
t_en: But... I think you must've heard what happened later — Rivet Town became affected by the Fragmentum, and we had no choice but to leave for Boulder Town.

t_ch: 虽然因为如今失去铆钉镇的那座大宅子，让儿童公社显得有些窘迫…但好在孩子们并不在乎这个。
t_en: Losing the big old estate house in Rivet Town left the clinic nursery in a real predicament... But fortunately the kids didn't mind the transition at all.

t_ch: 对他们来说，吃饱、穿暖，还能和小伙伴们一起，这就是生活的全部。他们无从渴望更广阔的世界——因为在下层区的他们，根本不可能见过那样的世界。
t_en: For them, having food to eat, clothes on their backs, and friends to play with was all they needed in life. They've no way of longing for anything more — because they come from the Underworld. They've never known any other kind of world.

t_ch: 但对我而言不是这样——我会尽一切可能给他们力所能及范围内的、最优渥的生活条件，帮助他们成长，做一个正直、善良、幸福的人……
t_en: But that's not the case for me — I will do everything I can to give them the best living conditions possible, to help them grow up to be upright, kind, and happy people...

t_ch: …他们值得这样一个未来。这也是我运营诊所和儿童公社至今，还加入了「地火」的原因。
t_en: ...Because they deserve such a future. This is why I've been running the clinic nursery and the clinic, and it's why I've joined Wildfire.

t_ch: 我没什么想问的了。
t_en: I don't have any more questions.

t_ch: 既然这样…请允许我问最后一个问题吧。
t_en: If that's so... Then please allow me to ask you one more thing.

t_ch: 娜塔莎小姐——您希望成为志愿导览员的原因是什么呢？
t_en: Miss Natasha: What is your reason for wanting to be a volunteer guide?
Oh...

t_ch: 我恐怕没有太过宏大的目标…或许只是为了圆儿时的梦吧？再者，我想把这里的见闻带给那些尚无法回到上层区的孩子们——他们一定会喜欢的。
t_en: I'm afraid it's nothing lofty... Maybe I'm just fulfilling a childhood dream? Also, I want to retell what I see here to the kids who couldn't make it up to the Overworld — they would love to hear about it.

t_ch: …我明白了。谢谢你，娜塔莎小姐。
t_en: ...I understand. Thank you, Miss Natasha.

t_ch: 那么，面试就到这里了。接下来公布面试结果……
t_en: Let's call it a day then. I'll announce the result now...

t_ch: 恭喜您，娜塔莎小姐——很高兴能与您再度共事！
t_en: Congratulations, Miss Natasha — it's a pleasure to be able to work with you again!

t_ch: 呵呵…我也感到很高兴。希望将来也能在博物馆里见到你，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Hehe... The pleasure is mine, too. I hope to see you at the museum again in the future as well, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 今天也辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。我先带娜塔莎小姐去做入职准备，回见！
t_en: Good work today, {NICKNAME}. I'll help Miss Natasha finish getting all signed up. See you later!

t_ch: 你有兴趣来博物馆当志愿者吗？
t_en: Are you interested in volunteering at the museum?

t_ch: 博物馆？
t_en: The museum?

t_ch: 志愿者？
t_en: Volunteering?

t_ch: 那是什么哇？
t_en: What's that?

t_ch: 博物馆是展览文物的地方。
t_en: A museum is a place where cultural relics are exhibited.

t_ch: 哇哦，听起来很适合举办鼹鼠大探险！
t_en: Wow, sounds like the perfect place for the Moles' big adventure!

t_ch: 志愿者是自愿帮助他人的人。
t_en: Volunteering is when you volunteer to help somebody else out.

t_ch: 哇哦，听起来很适合我们鼹鼠党！
t_en: Wow, sounds like the perfect thing for us Moles!

t_ch: 别问，问就是好玩的。
t_en: No questions, just know it's something super fun.

t_ch: 真的吗？你可不要骗虎克哦！
t_en: Really? You better not be tricking me!

t_ch: 既然这样——荣誉队员，我们快出发吧！虎克要去那个什么薄…薄雾……
t_en: If that's so — dear honorary member, let's go! Let's go to this moosy— moosy-yum...

t_ch: 是博物馆。
t_en: Mu-se-um.

t_ch: 对，对对对！就是那个博物馆！
t_en: Yeah, that's the one! The museum!

t_ch: 薄雾什么？
t_en: Moosy-what?

t_ch: 嗨呀，是博物馆！这不是荣誉队员你说的嘛，怎么连你也忘了呀！
t_en: A museum! Isn't that what you said? How could you forget!

t_en: I wanna go and be a villainteer...

t_ch: 是志愿者。
t_en: It's VOLUNTEER.

t_ch: 对，对对对！就是这个志愿者！
t_en: Yeah, that's the one! A volunteer!

t_ch: 什么支援？
t_en: Villain-teer?

t_en: Agh, I mean volunteer! You shouldn't sully Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's... um... great name!

t_en: Alright. Let's go, let's go — I can't wait!

t_en: Before we get going, you have to fill out an application form.

t_en: Application form? What's that? Show it to me!

t_ch: 你还必须通过一道神秘的考验…
t_en: You also have to pass a mysterious test...

t_ch: 喔——听起来很有趣！是什么考验呀？这张纸是什么？
t_en: Wow — sounds awesome! What kind of test is it? What's this piece of paper for?

t_ch: 递给虎克申请表。
t_en: (Give the application form to Hook.)

t_ch: 只要把这些都写进去就好了嘛？太简单了，看我的！
t_en: So all I have to do is just write these things in here? Too easy, watch this!

t_ch: 哼哼，虎克一下子就把它搞定啦！这下荣誉队员就可以带我去博物馆了吧？
t_en: Hmph, I got it done in no time at all! Now you can take me to the museum, right? Honorary member?

t_ch: 没问题了，我们出发吧！
t_en: That's right. Let's go!

t_ch: 哦——去做志愿者咯！
t_en: Ah — Let's go be volunteers!

t_ch: 我先帮你看看简历合不合适…
t_en: Let me give your resume a look...

t_ch: 什么呀，不许看！这里面可写着鼹鼠党的机密呢！
t_en: What? You can't see that! There's top-secret Mole intel in there!

t_ch: 好啦好啦，我们快走吧——去做志愿者咯！
t_en: Fine fine fine. Then let's go be volunteers!

t_ch: 哇哦，这里好宽敞呀！感觉…感觉有好几个诊所那么大！
t_en: Wow, it's so big in here! It feels... It feels like ten clinics put together!

t_ch: 接下来我们要做什么呀？难道我们已经开始扮演志愿者了吗？
t_en: What happens next? Don't tell me we've already started playing volunteers?

t_ch: 艾丽斯小姐，给你简历。
t_en: Miss Eris, here's a resume.

t_ch: 您好，{NICKNAME}！哎呀，今天还带着一位这么可爱的小朋友呢。
t_en: Hello, {NICKNAME}! I see you've got the company of a lovely kid today.

t_ch: 谁是小朋友呀！要叫我漆黑的虎克大人！
t_en: I'm not a kid! I'm Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

t_ch: 呵呵，小虎克也想来做志愿导览员呀。我这就去让佩拉小姐看看简历，请二位稍作等候。
t_en: Hehe, are you here to be a volunteer guide too? I'll have Pela look at your resume. Please wait here.

t_ch: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}。还有…漆黑的虎克大人？
t_en: Here we are again, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} and... Pitch-Dark Hook the Great?

t_ch: 咦？这不是荣誉队员克拉拉嘛！你也来做志愿者吗？
t_en: Eh? Aren't you Clara, one of our honorary members? Are you here to be a volunteer too?

t_ch: 怎么是你？佩拉呢？
t_en: Why are you here? Where's Pela?

t_ch: 嗯…其实是佩拉小姐委托我来进行今天的面试……
t_en: ... Pela asked me to help conduct the interview today...

t_ch: 你也来做志愿者吗？
t_en: Are you here to be a volunteer too?

t_ch: 嗯…是这样没错。然后，佩拉小姐委托我来进行今天的面试……
t_en: Yup... That's right. By the way, Pela asked me to help conduct the interview today...

t_ch: 她怎么不自己上？
t_en: Why can't she be here herself?

t_ch: 佩拉小姐被其他事情缠住了……
t_en: She has other matters to attend to...

t_ch: 不过，她读过虎克的简历，认为没问题…所以就拜托我来推进后续的流程了。
t_en: Still, she checked Hook's resume and thought she was a good fit... So, she entrusted the rest of the process to me.

t_ch: 辛苦你了，克拉拉。
t_en: Thanks, Clara.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，没事的。能帮上佩拉小姐的忙，克拉拉也觉得很开心。
t_en: It's no problem. I'm glad to be able to help Pela out.

t_ch: 总感觉事情会变复杂…
t_en: I have a bad feeling about this...

t_ch: 唔…应该…不会的！虽然克拉拉没有经验…但克拉拉会努力做好的。
t_en: Um... There... shouldn't be any problem! Although I have no experience giving interviews, I'll do my best.

t_ch: 总之…我们先到休息处那边去吧——面试会在那里进行。
t_en: Anyway... let's head to the lounge first. The interview will be held there.

t_ch: 另外，克拉拉听佩拉小姐说，她指定了{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}你做面试的辅助评定人……
t_en: By the way, Pela has also appointed {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} as the assistant assessor of the interview...

t_ch: 所以…可能要占用{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}一点时间了，非常抱歉！
t_en: So... this is going to take up some of your time, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 没关系，我很乐意帮忙。
t_en: That's fine. I'd love to help.

t_ch: 唔…谢谢{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}！
t_en: Oh, thank you so much, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 没关系，我已经习惯了…
t_en: That's fine. I'm used to it...

t_ch: 添…添麻烦了！真的很不好意思！
t_en: I'm... sorry for imposing this on you!

t_ch: 那，等{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}准备好了，我们就开始面试吧——我们就在这里等你哦。
t_en: Well, let's start the interview when you're ready, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. We'll wait for you here.

t_ch: 虽然搞不懂发生了什么…但我和克拉拉会等你的！
t_en: Although I'm not sure what all this is about, I'll wait for you with Clara!

t_ch: 啊，是{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}！你已经准备好了吗？
t_en: Oh, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} is here! Are you ready?

t_ch: 开始吧。
t_en: Let's begin.

t_ch: 嗯！那我们就开始吧。
t_en: Great! Let's do it.

t_ch: 请再稍等我一会儿。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 好，那{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}先忙。
t_en: Sure. Come back here when you're ready, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 所以，面试到底是什么呀？我不能直接当那个志…志愿者吗？
t_en: So, what exactly is an interview? Can't I just become that vo—volunteer directly?

t_ch: 虽然克拉拉也不清楚…但根据佩拉小姐的说法，面试就是通过面对面谈话的方式，考查一个人是不是真的适合这份工作。
t_en: I'm not sure about it either... According to Pela, an interview is a way to find out whether a person is suitable for a job through a face-to-face conversation.

t_ch: 所以就是聊天咯？好哦！
t_en: So that's just chatting, right? That's great!

t_ch: 呜…也不全是啦……
t_en: Um... Not exactly...

t_ch: 没关系，克拉拉，你别紧张！虎克我已经完全理解面试是什么了，让我们开始吧！
t_en: Take it easy, Clara! I fully understand what an interview is all about. Let's get started!

t_ch: 克拉拉，别紧张！
t_en: Clara, don't be nervous!

t_ch: 嗯…克拉拉不会紧张的……
t_en: Okay... I'm fine...

t_ch: 事情要朝奇怪的方向发展了…
t_en: This is getting weird...

t_ch: 应该…应该不会吧。克拉拉会加油的！
t_en: It.. it should be fine. I'll give it my all!

t_ch: …咦？总感觉这话由克拉拉来说不大对。
t_en: ...Eh? It doesn't feel right for me to say this.

t_ch: 不管怎么样…克拉拉要根据虎克的简历提问了哦。准备好了吗？
t_en: Anyway... I'll start asking questions about your resume. Are you ready?

t_ch: 不对不对，荣誉队员克拉拉！哪怕是在上层区，也要好好叫我漆黑的虎克大人才行啊！
t_en: Wait a minute, Clara! Even though we are in the Overworld, you should still address me properly as Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!
...Huh?

t_ch: 虎克大人说得对！
t_en: Hook the Great is right!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，怎么连你也……
t_en: {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, even you are chirping in...
...Huh?

t_ch: 事情…好像不该这样发展的……
t_en: This isn't what I expected...

t_ch: 哎呀，看来你还是太紧张了——还是让虎克我来主持这个面…面试吧！
t_en: Hmm, seems like you're a little nervous. I'll take over this in-interview from here!

t_ch: 请听题，克拉拉队员！第一题——你为什么会来博物馆担任志愿管理员呢？！
t_en: Please listen to the questions carefully, Clara! Question One: Why do you want to be a volunteer guide at the museum?

t_ch: 这个……
t_en: Well...

t_ch: 我该怎么办，{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}？
t_en: What should I do, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 如实回答虎克大人！
t_en: Answer Hook the Great's questions — truthfully!

t_ch: 没错，克拉拉——你如实回答就好了，不用害怕！我们的面试很轻松的啦！
t_en: Exactly, Clara. Just answer truthfully, and don't be scared! We're just having a casual conversation here!

t_ch: 欸？！现在是该这样的吗…那好吧……
t_en: Eh!? Is this how the interview should be conducted... Fine...

t_ch: 想办法拿回主动权吧…
t_en: You should try to take back control of the interview...

t_ch: 啊…{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}说得对！克拉拉得想想办法……
t_en: Ah... {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} is right! I should think of a way...

t_ch: 哎呀，你不要打断她的思路啦，荣誉队员！要不然克拉拉变得更紧张了怎么办？
t_en: Don't interrupt her train of thought, honorary member! What if Clara gets even more nervous?

t_ch: 好啦，克拉拉——你如实回答就好了，不用害怕！我们的面试很轻松的啦！
t_en: Take it easy, Clara... Just answer truthfully, and don't be scared! We're just having a casual conversation here!

t_ch: 欸…那、那好吧……
t_en: Eh... O—Okay then...

t_ch: 其实，是因为克拉拉之前帮佩拉小姐和{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}解决了展品失窃案……
t_en: In fact, it's because I helped Pela and {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} to solve the missing exhibits case before...

t_ch: 佩拉小姐认可克拉拉的能力，所以就叫克拉拉来做志愿导览员了……
t_en: Pela recognized my ability, so she suggested that I work as a volunteer guide here...

t_ch: 我身为鼹鼠党的老大，甚至都不知道发生过这种事…是我失职了！
t_en: As the leader of The Moles, I didn't even know about this... I have neglected my responsibilities!

t_ch: 不过，这也侧面反映出克拉拉队员高强的能力！连失窃的展品都能找到，做志愿导览员肯定也不在话下！
t_en: Anyway, this case indirectly manifests your talent! Since you were able to help find the missing exhibits, I'm sure you will ace it as a volunteer guide!

t_ch: 那么，下一题！克拉拉队员——你知道志愿导览员的职责是什么吗？！
t_en: Now, the next question! Are you aware of the duties of a volunteer guide?

t_ch: 这个……
t_en: Well...

t_ch: 说吧，你肯定比虎克大人清楚！
t_en: Please share what you know. I'm sure you know more than Hook the Great!

t_ch: 就是就是！想到什么就说什么吧，克拉拉！
t_en: Exactly! Just say whatever you want to share, Clara!

t_ch: …等等，{NICKNAME}队员——虎克怎么感觉你这句话不太对？
t_en: ...Hold on, {NICKNAME}. What you just said didn't sound right to me.

t_ch: 这面试越来越不对劲了…
t_en: This interview is getting out of hand...

t_ch: 说什么呢，{NICKNAME}队员！面试不就是这样的嘛！
t_en: What are you talking about, {NICKNAME}? Isn't this what an interview is supposed to be like?

t_ch: 肯定没人比虎克更懂面试啦，你就放一百个心吧！
t_en: Nobody knows interviews better than me, believe me! So don't you worry!

t_ch: 呜…志愿导览员的职责…让克拉拉想想……
t_en: Um... The duties of a volunteer guide... Let me think...

t_ch: 第一，要及时响应观众的疑问和诉求，帮助大家了解展馆和展品；第二，要爱护展区展品和其他公共财产，维护展馆整洁；第三……
t_en: Firstly, I should respond to the questions and needs of the visitors promptly and help everyone to understand the museum and the exhibits. Secondly, I should take care of the exhibits and other public properties, as well as maintain the cleanliness of the exhibition hall. Thirdly...

t_ch: 好了，克拉拉队员，你答得很好！虎克觉得你没必要再回答下去了！
t_en: Well, that's a brilliant answer! I don't think you have to elaborate any further.

t_ch: 欸…谢谢虎…不是，谢谢漆黑的虎克大人！
t_en: Eh... Thank you, Ho- Sorry — it should be Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

t_ch: 虎克大人面试有方，厉害！
t_en: Hook the Great is an amazing interviewer!

t_ch: 哼哼，不愧是我漆黑的虎克！不过克拉拉队员也很厉害啦！
t_en: Hee-hee, I know I'm good! Clara's done a pretty good job too!

t_ch: 你怎么还谢谢她啊？
t_en: Why did you thank her?

t_ch: 对不起！下意识就……
t_en: Sorry! I just blurted it out...

t_ch: 那么，下一题……
t_en: Now, the next question...

t_ch: 下一题会是什么呢？！
t_en: What will the next question be?

t_ch: 还要继续吗？！
t_en: Are we still doing this!?

t_ch: 看来已经无法回头了……
t_en: Seems like there's no going back now...

t_ch: 好了，就聊到这里吧！虎克大人要公布面试结果了哦——
t_en: Well, let's call it a day. I'll announce the result now...

t_ch: 恭喜你，克拉拉队员！我觉得，克拉拉队员完全能够胜任志愿导览员的工作！
t_en: Congratulations, Clara! I believe you will make a perfect volunteer guide!

t_ch: 啊，虽然克拉拉已经是志愿者了……
t_en: Umm, I'm already a volunteer...

t_ch: 那不是更好了吗？在我们鼹鼠党的帮助下，这个博物馆一定会热闹起来的！
t_en: Isn't that even better? With the help of the Moles, this museum will soon be teeming with life!

t_ch: 这…倒也没错啦……
t_en: Well... You're right in a sense...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，我先带虎克去做入职前的准备工作了——谢谢你，陪我们完成了这次面试……
t_en: {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I'll take Hook with me to prepare her for the job. Thanks for being with us during the interview.

t_ch: 应该的。
t_en: It's no big deal.

t_ch: 感觉已经和面试没关系了…
t_en: Are we sure that's how interviews should be done!?

t_ch: 克拉拉也有这样的感觉…不过，虎克她应该能做好志愿导览员的工作——至少我是这么觉得的。
t_en: I had my doubts. Still, Hook should be able to do the job well — at least that's what I think.

t_ch: 无论如何，今天都辛苦{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}了。之后有空的话，也请记得来馆里转转哦。
t_en: Anyway, thanks for your help, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Please swing by if you are free.

t_ch: 要来找我们玩哦，荣誉队员！我和克拉拉都会等着你的！
t_en: Remember to visit us, honorary member! Clara and I will wait for you!

t_ch: 你有兴趣来博物馆当志愿者吗？
t_en: Are you interested in volunteering at the museum?

t_ch: 志愿者？你是说志愿导览员吗？
t_en: Volunteer? Do you mean as a volunteer guide?

t_ch: 没记错的话，我先前已经向佩拉提交了申请表…是她没收到吗？
t_en: If I'm not mistaken, I submitted my application to Pela a while ago... Didn't she receive it?

t_ch: 我不知道，可能得问问她。
t_en: I'm not sure. I should probably ask her.

t_ch: 嗯，那就麻烦你再确认一下了。
t_en: Sure. Thanks for your help.

t_ch: 如果她确实没收到申请表的话，我再重新写一份便是。
t_en: If she doesn't have my application form, I'll just fill in a new one.

t_ch: 那没事了，我先撤了。
t_en: No problem. I'll be off, then.

t_ch: 请你先留步。如果你也对此不知情，那想必是流程推进过程中出了什么差池。
t_en: Please, wait a moment. If you know nothing about my application, then maybe it didn't reach her.

t_ch: 我想，你还是向她确认一下比较好。如果她确实没收到申请表的话，我再重新写一份便是。
t_en: I think you should probably check with her. If she doesn't have my application form, I'll just fill in a new one.

t_ch: 那我给她发个短信确认下。
t_en: I'll send her a message to ask about it.

t_ch: 麻烦你了。
t_en: Thanks for your help.

t_ch: 她说这是个误会。
t_en: She said it was a mistake.

t_ch: …我理解。她身为情报官，每天都要面对像山一样高的卷宗，能几年如一日地始终不出现错漏，反而不正常。
t_en: ...I understand. As an Intelligence Officer, she has to deal with piles of files every day. It is impossible not to mess up once in a while.

t_ch: 总之，情况我已经了解了。辛苦你专门跑一趟——没有你的话，我们两人恐怕至今还蒙在鼓里。
t_en: Anyway, I've got my answer. Thanks for your hard work. Without you, both of us would still be in the dark about the situation.

t_ch: 那么…我要去准备她说的面试了——希望我之后能有幸在博物馆里为你导览，回见。
t_en: Now... I need to start preparing for the interview she mentioned. I hope I'll have the chance to be your museum guide soon. See you around.

t_ch: 嘿，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛。来找我有什么事？
t_en: Hey, isn't this {NICKNAME}? How can I help you?

t_ch: 你有兴趣来博物馆当志愿者吗？
t_en: Are you interested in volunteering at the museum?

t_ch: 哈，真够巧的！佩拉前脚刚走，你就来问我这个啦。
t_en: What a coincidence! You came asking about this right after Pela left.

t_ch: 她刚给我塞了份简历表格，说是填好这个交到博物馆接待处，之后等面试通知就行——我现在正发愁怎么办呢。
t_en: She passed me an application form and asked me to fill it out, submit it to the museum reception desk, and wait for the call for an interview. I'm still on the fence now.

t_ch: 快来，工资日结包三餐！
t_en: Apply now! You'll get paid daily and three square meals on the house.

t_ch: 哈哈，那这流程看起来倒也没那么麻烦了。
t_en: Well then, the application doesn't sound like too much trouble now.

t_ch: 你听起来好像没兴趣。
t_en: Seems like you are not interested.

t_ch: 倒也不是没兴趣啦，只是这流程未免太麻烦了点。
t_en: That's not really the case. I just find the application too troublesome.

t_ch: 好家伙，这么麻烦？
t_en: My goodness, is it that much of a hassle?

t_ch: 哈哈，可不是嘛——典型的筑城者做派。
t_en: Haha, exactly... It's typical of the Architects.

t_ch: 不过，佩拉倒是也说得没错：这城里没人不知道我和她平时有来往。要是不走这么个正式流程，难免给人落了口实。

t_en: ...to the point where now, whenever I see a form header that says "Belobog," "Silvermane Guards," or "Qlipoth Fort," my hand just starts moving on its own and I can't write anything else.

t_en: You may make changes to the "Personal Experience"...

t_en: Write this: "Assisted wanted outsiders in escaping the pursuit of Silvermane Guards multiple times, and successfully defeated the Silvermane officers and captain in the Stellaron Crisis." What do you think?

t_en: Sounds cool! Let's put it in.

t_en: Great! Let's do it!

t_en: Sure, it's your decision. Anything else?

t_en: Let's shorten it: "I'm good at everything other than making money." What do you think?

t_ch: 简洁有力！就这个吧。
t_en: Haha, concise and to the point! Let's use this one.

t_ch: 不愧是我！那就这么定啦！
t_en: I deserve a pat on the back! Let's do it!

t_ch: 算了，还是别改了。
t_en: Forget it. Let's keep it as is.

t_ch: 好啊，你说了算。还有其他地方需要调整吗？
t_en: Sure, it's your decision. Anything else?

t_ch: 好了，这样就完美了。
t_en: There, it's perfect.

t_ch: 嘿，既然连你都这么说，那我就放心了。
t_en: Hee-hee, glad to hear that, your words give me confidence.

t_ch: 就这样吧，挺好的。
t_en: This is it. It's already great.

t_ch: 嘿，既然连你都这么说，那我就放心了。
t_en: Hee-hee, glad to hear that, your words give me confidence.

t_ch: 我觉得不用再修改了。
t_en: I don't think it needs to be modified.

t_ch: 嘿，既然连你都这么说，那我就放心了。
t_en: Hee-hee, glad to hear that, your words give me confidence.

t_ch: 那我稍后就把这份简历提交上去——走吧，陪我一起去博物馆！
t_en: I'll submit this resume in a bit. Come on! Let's go to the museum!

t_en: Hello there, may I hand in the volunteer guide application form to you?

t_ch: 您好，希露瓦小姐！我这就把您的简历转交给佩拉小姐过目！
t_en: Hello, Miss Serval! I'll pass your resume on to Miss Pela right away!

t_en: ...So soon!?
...*sigh*

t_ch: 为什么要叹气……
t_en: What's with the sighing...

t_ch: 没什么。来，跟我到休息区吧。
t_en: Nothing. Please follow me to the Rest Area.

t_ch: 现在是休息的时候吗？
t_en: Can I take a break now?

t_ch: 想什么呢，当然不是啊——面试需要你来做辅助评定，别想跑。
t_en: What are you thinking? Of course not! Surely we need you to be an assistant assessor for the interview. Don't even think about running off.

t_ch: 看来我可以告辞了…
t_en: Seems like time for me to go...

t_ch: 别高兴得太早，你也跟着一起过来——面试需要你来做辅助评定。
t_en: Not so fast... You're coming with us. We need you to be an assistant assessor for the interview.

t_ch: 果然还是逃不掉吗……
t_en: Ha, there's no escaping it after all..

t_ch: 当然了，该走的流程还是要走的…而且，我对你简历里的内容非常感兴趣。
t_en: But of course, we still have to go through the necessary steps... Besides, I'm really interested in what's on your resume.

t_ch: 你先准备准备，希露瓦。至于{NICKNAME}——有什么事还没办的话先去吧，我们会等你的。
t_en: Please get ready for the interview, Serval. As for {NICKNAME}, you may get on with your things first. We'll be waiting for you.

t_en: And now you're back, {NICKNAME}. Can we begin the interview now?

t_ch: 开始吧。
t_en: Let's begin.

t_ch: …咳咳。那么，请做好准备，希露瓦小姐，面试即将开始——
t_en: ...Ahem, very well. Please get ready, Miss Serval. The interview is about to begin...

t_ch: 这也…太正式了吧……
t_en: This is... so formal...

t_ch: 请再稍等我一会儿。
t_en: Please give me a moment.

t_ch: 去吧。我是无所谓的，就是要再折磨一会儿希露瓦了。
t_en: Go ahead. It doesn't bother me, but Serval would need to deal with the anxiety for a bit longer.

t_ch: 你快点儿啊，{NICKNAME}！咱们速战速决……
t_en: Hurry up, {NICKNAME}! Let's get this done and over with quickly!

t_ch: 那么，希露瓦小姐……
t_en: Well, Miss Serval...

t_en: Wait, let me ask {NICKNAME} something first. Did you provide any help to Miss Serval in completing this resume?

t_ch: 我向来乐于助人！
t_en: I always like to help other people!

t_ch: …呵呵，事情变得有意思起来了。
t_en: ...Hehe, this is getting interesting.

t_ch: 绝无此事！
t_en: Absolutely not!

t_en: ...Hehe, I see this is Serval's style. How interesting.

t_en: Ahem, please be quiet.

t_ch: …你这肯定是故意的吧？！
t_en: You aren't just putting your serious face on, are you?

t_ch: 好了，希露瓦小姐。有关下一个问题……
t_en: Alright Miss Serval, let's go to the next question...

t_en: Could you tell me more about your complicated name, "Belobog's one and only rock'n'roll superstar and mechanics genius, Serval Landau"? As far as I know, that's not your real name...

t_ch: 呃…这个……
t_en: Um... About that...

t_ch: （佩拉她肯定是故意的…我该怎么回答啊{NICKNAME}？！）
t_en: (I'm sure Pela asks this on purpose... How should I reply, {NICKNAME}?)

t_ch: 怎么想的就怎么说！
t_en: Just say whatever is on your mind!
You...

t_ch: 咳咳！这个名字…不是，是这个称号……
t_en: Ahem! This name... no, this title...

t_ch: <size=36>你不觉得很摇滚吗？！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Don't you think it's very rock 'n' roll?</size>

t_ch: 就说是我帮你改的…
t_en: Just say it's my idea...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，不愧是你…敢作敢当！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, that's so you... very bold indeed!

t_ch: 咳咳！这个名字…不是，是这个称号……
t_en: Ahem! This name... no, this title...

t_ch: 其实是{NICKNAME}给我出的主意——{F#她}{M#他}觉得这样更能显示自己的个性……
t_en: In fact, it's {NICKNAME}'s idea. {F#She}{M#He} thinks it's a good way to express my personality...

t_ch: …呵呵，原来如此。那么，我们来看看下一个问题……
t_en: ...I see. Well, let's move on to the next question...

t_ch: 从来没见过这么恐怖的佩拉……
t_en: I've never seen Pela looking so intimidating...

t_ch: 姓名…似乎没什么好说的。来看下一个吧……
t_en: Name... There's nothing to talk about. Let's check out the next column...

t_ch: 关于个人经历——我看到您在这里写着「星核危机解决前夕，多次协助外来者通缉犯成功逃避银鬃铁卫追捕，并在冲突中成功击败铁卫军官和戍卫官」……
t_en: About your personal experience, I see that you have "assisted wanted outsiders in escaping the pursuit of Silvermane Guards multiple times, and successfully defeated the Silvermane officers and captain in the Stellaron Crisis"...

t_ch: 这可是大功一件啊！能请您详细描述一下来龙去脉吗？
t_en: That's a remarkable achievement! Do you mind describing this story in detail?

t_ch: 咳咳……
t_en: Ahem...

t_ch: 既然她想听，那就说给她听！
t_en: Since she's so interested, just tell her!

t_ch: 有道理……
t_en: You have a point...

t_ch: 其实，当时发生了这样的事……
t_en: So, this is what happened at that time...

t_ch: 希露瓦绘声绘色地描述了当时经历的种种……
t_en: Serval described what happened back there in detail...

t_ch: 没想到你真的说了……
t_en: Wow, I didn't actually expect you to recount the whole story...

t_ch: 现在给佩拉道歉还来得及…
t_en: It's not too late to apologize to Pela now...

t_ch: 你说得对…真诚永远是最好的武器！
t_en: You're right... Sincerity is the best policy!

t_ch: <size=36>对不起，银鬃铁卫的情报官大人！</size>
t_en: <size=36>I'm sorry, the great Intelligence Officer of the Silvermane Guards!</size>

t_ch: 把这种事写进简历，是我太草率了……

t_ch: …呵呵，真是太有趣了。
t_en: ...Hehe, how interesting.

t_ch: 个人经历…很漂亮嘛，不愧是你。接着看下一个吧……
t_en: You certainly have an impressive personal experience. Now, let's check out the next column...

t_ch: 技能特长这栏，「除了赚钱都很擅长」——您写得非常简洁嘛！
t_en: For skills and expertise, you say you are "good at everything except making money." How concise and to the point!

t_ch: 可是，也许希露瓦小姐您不知道，我们运营博物馆和做生意也是十分相似的…如果因为您能力上的短板导致博物馆经营不善，我们又该怎么办呢？
t_en: For your information, Miss Serval, we're running the museum like a business... What should we do if your inability leads to the mismanagement of the museum?
Well...

t_ch: （{NICKNAME}，你也看到了吧？！她刚刚肯定是笑了！）
t_en: ({NICKNAME}, did you see that!? She laughed, didn't she?)

t_ch: 你倒贴啊！还能怎么办？
t_en: Just say you will compensate for the loss! What else can you do?

t_ch: …你花别人的钱不心疼是吧？
t_en: ...You only say that because it isn't your money.

t_ch: 面试官您好，关于这个问题，我是这么想的……
t_en: Miss Pela, this is what I think about this issue...

t_ch: 如果因为我个人原因，导致博物馆出现了经营不善的状况——这部分损失将由我个人承担！如果需要的话，我甚至可以倒贴！
t_en: If the mismanagement is the result of my individual mistake, I'll bear the loss and even pay compensation!

t_ch: …还蛮有魄力的嘛。
t_en: ...That's quite admirable.

t_ch: 也许你真的不适合这个工作…
t_en: Maybe this job isn't for you after all...

t_ch: 我也意识到这个问题了……
t_en: I'm aware of this problem too...

t_ch: 面试官，关于这个问题，我是这么想的……
t_en: Miss Pela, this is what I think about this issue...

t_ch: …您说的对！不擅长赚钱的我，确实不适合这样的工作！
t_en: ...You're right! As someone who finds it hard to make money, I'm not suitable for a job like this!

t_ch: …你真的是希露瓦吗？！
t_en: ...Are you really the Serval I know!?

t_ch: 技能特长…真是满满当当啊，简直像报菜名一样——不过你的能力确实很强，大家有目共睹。
t_en: You have a long list of skills and expertise. You're indeed very capable. Everyone can see that.

t_ch: 好了，面试就到这里吧。接下来公布面试结果……
t_en: Well, let's call it a day. I'll announce the result now...

t_ch: 恭喜你，希露瓦——你通过测试了。
t_en: Congratulations, Serval! It's a pass.

t_ch: 另外，刚才的面试里欺负你欺负得有点过头了，非常抱歉。
t_en: By the way, I must apologize for being such a bully just now.

t_ch: …我就知道！该不会连这场面试也是你为了拿我打趣才精心设计的骗局吧？
t_en: ...I knew it! You didn't set up this whole interview as a prank to make fun of me, did you?

t_ch: 哼哼，那倒不是。这套招募流程是馆长的要求，我只是照办而已——但无论如何，你身为摇滚明星，愿你能够点燃大家前来博物馆参观的热情。
t_en: Um... You're overthinking this. The hiring process is requested by the curator, and I'm merely doing my job... But anyway, I hope you, as a rock star, can ignite everyone's passion to visit the museum.

t_ch: 另外，{NICKNAME}，今天也辛苦你了。感谢你为博物馆振兴计划的付出！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, thank you for what you have done to revitalize the museum!

t_ch: 很抱歉，希露瓦——虽然我在刚才的提问里确实带有欺负你的心态…但，我想，我在刚才的面试里并没有看到你真实的样子。
t_en: Serval, I'm sorry for bullying you with those questions just now... However, I think you were not being yourself during the interview.

t_ch: …我就知道！但这面试流程竟然这么严格吗？
t_en: ...I knew it! Is the interview normally this strict?

t_ch: 那倒没有，只要品德和能力够格，我们一般就予以录用了。
t_en: It isn't. We'll usually recruit an applicant as long as he or she has good character and is capable.

t_ch: 所以，希露瓦…你其实没必要把这件事看得太重。心态放松一些，展现出自己最真实的一面，这样就足够了——如果总是小心翼翼地端着，反而容易把事情搞砸呢。
t_en: So, Serval... You don't have to take this too seriously. Just relax and show your true self. If you're always so uptight, you'll tend to mess up.

t_ch: 好了，今天就先到这里吧，想必你们也都累了。之后如果还想再试试的话，就来休息区找我吧。
t_en: Well, let's call it a day. I'm sure you two are tired, too. If you want to give it another shot, just drop by the Rest Area.
